name: kaseki-agent
description: Ephemeral coding-agent runner with Pi CLI and OpenRouter

scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && node kaseki-cli.test.js && bash run-kaseki-json.test.sh
scripts.check:syntax: bash -c 'for file in *.js; do node --check "$file"; done'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js:fix && npm run lint:sh
